--- match_coverage_path_modes.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
-- Path Modes (singular/plural)
MATCH WALK PATH (aw)-[ew]->(bw)
MATCH WALK PATHS (aws)-[ews]->(bws)
MATCH TRAIL PATH (atvar)-[et]->(btvar)
MATCH SIMPLE PATH (asvar)-[es]->(bsvar)
MATCH ACYCLIC PATH (aa)-[ea]->(ba)
RETURN *

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       47,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Mode: &ast.GQLPathModeClause{
                    StartPos: 53,
                    EndPos:   62,
                    Mode:     "WALK",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  63,
                          Rparen:  66,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 64,
                              NameEnd: 66,
                              Name:    "aw",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  67,
                          EndPos:    74,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 69,
                              NameEnd: 71,
                              Name:    "ew",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  74,
                          Rparen:  77,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 75,
                              NameEnd: 77,
                              Name:    "bw",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       79,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Mode: &ast.GQLPathModeClause{
                    StartPos: 85,
                    EndPos:   95,
                    Mode:     "WALK",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  96,
                          Rparen:  100,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 97,
                              NameEnd: 100,
                              Name:    "aws",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  101,
                          EndPos:    109,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 103,
                              NameEnd: 106,
                              Name:    "ews",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  109,
                          Rparen:  113,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 110,
                              NameEnd: 113,
                              Name:    "bws",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       115,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Mode: &ast.GQLPathModeClause{
                    StartPos: 121,
                    EndPos:   131,
                    Mode:     "TRAIL",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  132,
                          Rparen:  138,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 133,
                              NameEnd: 138,
                              Name:    "atvar",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  139,
                          EndPos:    146,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 141,
                              NameEnd: 143,
                              Name:    "et",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  146,
                          Rparen:  152,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 147,
                              NameEnd: 152,
                              Name:    "btvar",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       154,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Mode: &ast.GQLPathModeClause{
                    StartPos: 160,
                    EndPos:   171,
                    Mode:     "SIMPLE",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  172,
                          Rparen:  178,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 173,
                              NameEnd: 178,
                              Name:    "asvar",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  179,
                          EndPos:    186,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 181,
                              NameEnd: 183,
                              Name:    "es",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  186,
                          Rparen:  192,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 187,
                              NameEnd: 192,
                              Name:    "bsvar",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       194,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Mode: &ast.GQLPathModeClause{
                    StartPos: 200,
                    EndPos:   212,
                    Mode:     "ACYCLIC",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  213,
                          Rparen:  216,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 214,
                              NameEnd: 216,
                              Name:    "aa",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  217,
                          EndPos:    224,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 219,
                              NameEnd: 221,
                              Name:    "ea",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  224,
                          Rparen:  227,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 225,
                              NameEnd: 227,
                              Name:    "ba",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 229,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 236,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH WALK (aw)-[ew]->(bw) MATCH WALK (aws)-[ews]->(bws) MATCH TRAIL (atvar)-[et]->(btvar) MATCH SIMPLE (asvar)-[es]->(bsvar) MATCH ACYCLIC (aa)-[ea]->(ba) RETURN *
